title: Telemetry handler that distinguishes errors by worker name
prompt: Write `MyApp.ObanTelemetry` with a `handle_event/4` function that pattern-matches on `[:oban, :job, :exception]` and extracts `metadata.worker` (a binary/string). For `"MyApp.Workers.PaymentWorker"` errors, call `MyApp.Alerting.page_oncall(metadata)` in addition to logging. For all other workers, just log via `Logger.error/1`. Also include an `attach/0` function that calls `:telemetry.attach/4` with a static handler id `"oban-error-handler"`. Write to `lib/my_app/oban_telemetry.ex`.
tier_rationale: Event dispatch by worker name inside the handler — a realistic monitoring pattern that combines telemetry + pattern matching.
